name: Golden Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup green peas, thawed if frozen
8 ounces chorizo, diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 red bell pepper, cored, seeded and diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 green bell pepper, cored, seeded and diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 yellow bell pepper, cored, seeded and diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1/4 cup cilantro leaves or flat leaf parsley, chopped
1/2 cup red wine vinaigrette, to taste
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large, heavy pot. Add the rice, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, and saffron; stir well.
2. Reduce heat to medium, cover, and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Add the peas, chorizo, red, green, and yellow bell peppers, olives, onion, and cilantro. Stir to combine.
4. Cook until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Toss with the vinaigrette and season with salt and pepper.
7. Serve 8 to 10 portions.
Serves 8 to 10
Per serving (based on 8): 441 calories, 45g carbohydrates, 12g protein, 22g fat, 25mg cholesterol.
